input.input: How do I export my data to JSON format?

reference_output.output: Go to Settings → Data → Export to download your data. JSON, CSV, and Parquet formats are supported. Exports are processed asynchronously and emailed to you when ready.

input.input: I haven't received my password reset email.

reference_output.output: Password reset emails are sent within 2 minutes. Please check your spam folder. If the issue persists, I recommend creating a support ticket.

input.input: My app keeps getting HTTP 429 errors, can you help?

reference_output.output: HTTP 429 means you've exceeded your API rate limit. The Pro plan limit is 10,000 calls/day. You can request a temporary increase via Settings → API → Request Increase.

input.input: What's the status of ticket TKT-003?

reference_output.output: Ticket TKT-003 is currently in Pending status. The issue is SSO configuration help and it was opened 1 day ago.

input.input: I need to set up SSO with Okta for my enterprise.

reference_output.output: SSO is available on Enterprise plans. Okta is a supported provider along with Azure AD and Google Workspace. Follow the configuration guide at docs.example.com/sso.

input.input: What is the API rate limit for the Pro plan?

reference_output.output: The Pro plan allows 10,000 API calls per day. If you exceed this, you will receive an HTTP 429 error. You can request a temporary increase via Settings → API → Request Increase.

input.input: How do I update my billing information?

reference_output.output: To update your billing information, go to Settings → Billing in your account. To change your credit card, navigate to Settings → Payment Methods. Invoices are generated on the 1st of each month.
